heading: Home marketing incentive payment
label: 5756 Home marketing incentive payment
notes: Effective DateSection effective 180 days after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1996 Amendment note under .Sept. 23, 1996section 1725(a) of Pub. L. 104–201section 5722 of this title
amendments: Effective DateSection effective 180 days after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1996 Amendment note under .Sept. 23, 1996section 1725(a) of Pub. L. 104–201section 5722 of this title

children.text: the residence is entered into a relocation services program established under a contract in accordance with to arrange for the purchase of the residence;section 5724c of this title
the employee finds a buyer who completes the purchase of the residence through the program; and
the sale of the residence results in a reduced cost to the Government.
The Administrator of General Services shall prescribe regulations to carry out this section.

The regulations shall include a limitation on the maximum amount payable with respect to an employee’s residence. The Administrator shall establish the limitation in consultation with the Director of the Office of Management and Budget. For fiscal years 1997 and 1998, the maximum amount shall be the amount equal to five percent of the sale price of the residence.
